strategy.en: They planned a strategy to win the game.
strategy.zh: 他們規劃了贏得比賽的策略。

straw.en: She drank the juice through a straw.

strength.en: He used all his strength to push the door.

strip.en: She cut the paper into thin strips.

structure.en: The bridge has a strong structure.

stubborn.en: The stubborn child refused to listen.
stubborn.zh: 那個固執的孩子不肯聽話。

studio.en: The artist works in a small studio.
studio.zh: 這位藝術家在一間小工作室工作。

stuff.en: Please put your stuff in the box.
stuff.zh: 請把你的東西放進箱子裡。

suburb.en: They moved to a quiet suburb.
suburb.zh: 他們搬到了一個安靜的郊區。

suffer.en: Many people suffer during a war.

sufficient.en: We have sufficient food for the trip.
sufficient.zh: 我們有足夠的食物可以旅行。

suicide.en: The hotline helps people who think about suicide.
suicide.zh: 這條熱線幫助有輕生念頭的人。

sum.en: The sum of two and three is five.

summary.en: Write a short summary of the story.
summary.zh: 為這個故事寫一段簡短的摘要。

summit.en: They reached the summit at noon.

superior.en: This brand is superior to that one.
superior.zh: 這個牌子比那個牌子優良。

surround.zh: 樹木圍繞著那棟小房子。

survey.en: The survey asked about our eating habits.
survey.zh: 這份調查詢問我們的飲食習慣。

survivor.en: The survivor told us his story.
survivor.zh: 那位倖存者告訴我們他的故事。

suspect.en: The police suspect he stole the money.

suspicion.zh: 她奇怪的回答引起了懷疑。

swan.en: A white swan glided across the lake.

swear.en: I swear I am telling the truth.

sweat.en: He wiped the sweat from his forehead.

swell.en: Her ankle began to swell after the fall.
swell.zh: 她跌倒後腳踝開始腫起來。

swift.en: The deer made a swift escape.

sword.en: The knight drew his shiny sword.

tablet.en: Take one tablet after each meal.
tablet.zh: 每餐飯後服用一顆藥片。

tag.en: The price tag says fifty dollars.
tag.zh: 價格標籤上寫著五十元。

tailor.en: The tailor made him a fine suit.
tailor.zh: 裁縫為他做了一套好西裝。

talent.en: She has a talent for singing.

tame.en: The rabbit is tame and gentle.
tame.zh: 這隻兔子既溫馴又溫和。

tank.en: He keeps fish in a glass tank.

tap.en: She tapped me gently on the shoulder.

tasty.en: The soup was warm and tasty.

technical.en: He has a technical problem with his computer.
technical.zh: 他的電腦有技術上的問題。

technique.en: She learned a new painting technique.
technique.zh: 她學了一種新的繪畫技巧。

teenage.zh: 他們有兩個十幾歲的孩子。

temper.en: He lost his temper and shouted.

temporary.en: This is only a temporary job.

tend.en: Cats tend to sleep during the day.

tender.en: The meat was soft and tender.

tent.en: We set up a tent by the river.

thankful.en: I am thankful for my family.

theory.en: He has an interesting theory about it.
theory.zh: 他對此有個有趣的理論。

thirst.en: She drank water to quench her thirst.

thread.en: She sewed the button with a thread.

threat.en: Pollution is a threat to the ocean.

thumb.en: She hurt her thumb while cooking.
thumb.zh: 她煮飯時弄傷了大拇指。

tide.en: We left the beach when the tide came in.
tide.zh: 漲潮時我們離開了海灘。

tight.en: These shoes are too tight for me.
tight.zh: 這雙鞋對我來說太緊了。

tighten.en: He tightened the screw with a tool.

timber.en: The house was built with timber.
timber.zh: 這棟房子是用木材建造的。

ton.en: The truck can carry ten tons of goods.
ton.zh: 這輛卡車能載十噸貨物。

toss.en: He tossed the ball to his friend.

tough.en: It was a tough decision to make.

tourism.en: Tourism brings money to the town.
tourism.zh: 觀光業為這個城鎮帶來收入。

tourist.en: Many tourists visit the old temple.
tourist.zh: 許多遊客參觀這座古廟。

tow.en: A truck towed the broken car away.
tow.zh: 一輛卡車把故障的車拖走了。

tower.en: We climbed the tall tower for the view.

trace.en: There was no trace of the missing dog.
trace.zh: 走失的狗一點蹤跡都沒有。

trader.en: The trader sold goods at the market.

trail.en: We followed the trail up the mountain.

transport.en: Buses transport people across the city.
transport.zh: 公車載運人們穿越城市。

traveler.en: The tired traveler rested at the inn.
traveler.zh: 疲憊的旅人在旅館休息。

tray.en: She carried the cups on a tray.

trend.en: Short hair is the latest trend.
trend.zh: 短髮是最新的流行趨勢。

tribe.en: The tribe lives deep in the forest.
tribe.zh: 這個部落住在森林深處。

troop.en: The troops marched into the city.

trumpet.en: He plays the trumpet in the band.

trunk.en: The elephant lifted the log with its trunk.

truthful.zh: 她給了一個誠實的回答。

tub.en: He filled the tub with warm water.

tug.en: The child tugged at his mother's sleeve.
tug.zh: 那個孩子拉著媽媽的袖子。

tune.zh: 她哼著一首歡樂的曲子。

tunnel.en: The train went through a long tunnel.

tutor.en: A tutor helps him with math.

twist.en: Twist the lid to open the jar.

underlying.en: We must find the underlying cause.
underlying.zh: 我們必須找出潛在的原因。

underwear.en: She packed clean underwear for the trip.
underwear.zh: 她為旅行打包了乾淨的內衣。

unique.en: Each snowflake has a unique shape.
unique.zh: 每片雪花都有獨特的形狀。

unite.en: The team united to win the game.
unite.zh: 這支隊伍團結一致贏得比賽。

urban.en: Urban life is busy and fast.

vacant.en: There is a vacant seat at the back.

van.en: They moved the boxes in a van.

vanish.en: The magician made the coin vanish.

variety.en: The shop sells a variety of bread.
variety.zh: 這家店賣各式各樣的麵包。

various.en: The store has clothes in various colors.
various.zh: 這家店有各種顏色的衣服。

vary.en: Prices vary from shop to shop.
vary.zh: 每家店的價格各不相同。

vase.en: She put the flowers in a vase.

vehicle.en: No vehicles are allowed in the park.

verse.en: She read a verse from the poem.

vest.en: He wore a warm vest over his shirt.
vest.zh: 他在襯衫外穿了一件保暖背心。

victim.en: They sent help to the flood victims.
victim.zh: 他們派人援助水災災民。

violence.en: We should solve problems without violence.
violence.zh: 我們應該不用暴力來解決問題。

violent.en: The violent storm damaged many homes.
violent.zh: 猛烈的暴風雨損毀了許多房屋。

violet.en: She picked a small violet flower.

visible.en: The stars are visible on a clear night.
visible.zh: 晴朗的夜晚看得到星星。

vitamin.en: Oranges are rich in vitamin C.

vivid.en: She has vivid memories of that day.
vivid.zh: 她對那天有鮮明的回憶。

vocabulary.zh: 閱讀有助於累積你的字彙。

volleyball.en: We played volleyball on the beach.

voter.en: Every voter lined up at the station.
voter.zh: 每位選民在投票站排隊。

wage.en: Workers asked for a higher wage.

wagon.en: The horse pulled a heavy wagon.
wagon.zh: 馬拉著一輛沉重的貨車。

wander.en: We wandered around the old town.
wander.zh: 我們在老城裡四處閒逛。

warmth.en: We enjoyed the warmth of the fire.

warn.en: The sign warns us of the danger.
warn.zh: 這個標誌警告我們有危險。

waterfall.en: The waterfall fell from a high cliff.
waterfall.zh: 瀑布從高高的懸崖落下。

weaken.zh: 長期的疾病使他變虛弱。

wealthy.en: The wealthy man gave money to the poor.
wealthy.zh: 那位富有的人捐錢給窮人。

web.en: I found the answer on the web.
web.zh: 我在網路上找到了答案。

wed.en: They will wed in the spring.

weed.en: He pulled the weeds from the garden.

weekly.en: We have a weekly meeting on Monday.

weep.en: She began to weep at the sad news.
weep.zh: 聽到那個悲傷的消息她哭了起來。

whip.en: The rider used a whip on the horse.

wicked.en: The wicked witch scared the children.
wicked.zh: 邪惡的女巫嚇壞了孩子們。

widen.en: They plan to widen the narrow road.
widen.zh: 他們計畫拓寬這條窄路。

wipe.en: Please wipe the table after lunch.
wipe.zh: 午餐後請把桌子擦乾淨。

wisdom.zh: 我們從經驗中學習智慧。

wrap.en: She wrapped the gift in pretty paper.

wrist.en: He wears a watch on his wrist.

yearly.en: We take a yearly trip to the sea.
yearly.zh: 我們每年去海邊旅行一次。

yell.en: Don't yell; I can hear you.

yolk.en: The yolk of the egg is yellow.

youngster.en: The youngsters played in the park.

zipper.en: The zipper on my jacket is stuck.
